name: @smithers-orchestrator/jj-win32-x64
description: Vendored jj (Jujutsu) binary for win32-x64, used by @smithers-orchestrator/vcs. Installed automatically as an optional dependency; not meant to be depended on directly.

scripts.prepublishOnly: node -e "if(!require('fs').existsSync(__dirname+'/bin/jj.exe'))throw new Error('jj.exe missing — run pnpm fetch:jj before releasing')"
